528 O0400C5_PT_STRT_DT O0400C5_PT_STRT_DT O0400C5 Physical Therapy Start Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the start date for the most recent physical therapy. discontinued 09/30/2025
529 O0400C6_PT_END_DT O0400C6_PT_END_DT O0400C6 Physical Therapy End Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the end date for the most recent physical therapy.
